name: Bukit Keluang
description: Famous for its breathtaking coastal views and wooden walkways along the cliffside. Ideal for beginners and sunrise catching.

name: Bukit Besar
description: An iconic landmark in the heart of the city. Features a steep tarmac road and jungle trails leading to a panoramic view of the Drawbridge.

name: CBL (Chemerong-Berembun-Langsir)
description: A world-class expedition featuring the 305m Chemerong waterfall. Requires high fitness for multi-day river crossings and mossy forests.

name: Bukit Maras
description: A favorite for paragliders. The trail is steep but rewarding with a clear view of the South China Sea and the surrounding villages.

name: Lata Tembakah
description: A well-maintained recreational forest trail leading to a majestic 7-tiered waterfall. Perfect for family picnics and light jungle trekking.

name: Bukit Labuhan
description: Located near Kerteh, this trail offers a unique mix of jungle canopy and sudden openings to spectacular rocky coastal views.

name: Sekayu Recreational Forest
description: Gentle walking paths suitable for children and seniors, winding through tropical fruit orchards and multiple natural swimming pools.

name: Gunung Tebu
description: The highest peak in the area. Hikers are rewarded with a unique 'Bonsai' garden at the top and views of Perhentian Island on clear days.

name: Bukit Tokki
description: A rugged training ground for local hikers. Features multiple trail branches ranging from technical root climbs to steady slopes.

name: Lata Belatan
description: An accessible trail within the recreational forest, serving as the main entry point for more intense Gunung Tebu expeditions.

name: Bukit Bongsu
description: A secluded trail rich in local flora. Great for bird watching and experiencing a dense secondary rainforest canopy.

name: Bukit Bauk
description: Part of a protected forest reserve. The trail is well-marked and used for environmental education and daily fitness by locals.

name: Hutan Lipur Chemerong
description: Short, paved paths along the riverbank for those who want to see the waterfall base without a full mountain hike.

name: Bukit Harun
description: An off-the-beaten-path trail for experienced explorers. Features high humidity and dense vegetation typical of inland Terengganu.

name: Lata Payung
description: A hidden gem in Setiu. The trail follows a crystal-clear stream leading to a serene, umbrella-shaped waterfall pool.

name: Bukit Bidong
description: A gentle ascent through coastal hills. Provides a unique vantage point of the Setiu Wetlands and the coastline.

name: Bukit Merah
description: Known for its distinctive red soil. A moderate climb that is highly popular for local sunrise photography and morning workouts.

name: Bukit Tok Salai
description: Known as the "Nami Island of Terengganu" due to its beautiful pine trees and scenic trail.

name: Bukit Harimau Menangis
description: A legendary hill in Kemaman offering a moderate challenge and a refreshing waterfall at the end.

name: Bukit Puteri
description: A historical site overlooking the Terengganu River. Features 19th-century fortifications, cannons, and a lighthouse.

name: Bukit Rohok
description: A steep and challenging trail used by locals for training, featuring exposed roots and dense canopy.

name: Bukit Sekati
description: An easy trail overlooking the Terengganu River and the Sekati Bridge.

name: Bukit Pak Apil
description: A hidden gem in the city center providing a quick forest escape for urban dwellers.

name: Bukit Bubus
description: The premier spot for paragliding in Terengganu with panoramic views of the Perhentian Islands.

name: Lata Kolam Air Biru
description: A short walk to one of Terengganu's most stunning natural features: pools with a unique turquoise-blue tint.

name: Bukit Belakang Parang
description: A unique ridge trail in Dungun named after its sharp, "machete-back" shape.

name: Bukit Mak Dayang
description: The most popular evening hiking spot for Kemaman locals to watch the sunset.

name: Gunung Sarut
description: Home to the famous "Blue Pool," this mountain offers a world-class trekking experience.

name: Bukit Temiang
description: A peaceful forest trail in Marang, perfect for bird watching and nature photography.

name: Gunung Gagau
description: Located at the triple-point of Terengganu, Kelantan, and Pahang; a true wilderness expedition.

name: Bukit Tunggal
description: A very easy hill walk offering a 360-degree view of the surrounding paddy fields.

name: Bukit Merchu
description: A moderate climb in Besut ending at a windy summit with a prominent peak marker.

name: Bukit Jeram
description: One of the highest points in Kuala Terengganu, offering wide vistas of the coastal plain.

name: Bukit Singa
description: An iconic coastal trail on Pulau Kapas named after a lion-shaped rock formation.

name: Bukit Mentok
description: A popular fitness trail in Chukai known for its steep sections and exercise-friendly path.

name: Bukit Payong
description: A scenic ridge walk through secondary forest with frequent wildlife sightings.

name: Bukit Kor
description: A very accessible and short trail ideal for families and casual weekend strolls.

name: Gunung Padang
description: A natural forest reserve primarily known for its challenging multi-day hiking expeditions and diverse plant life.

name: Bukit Sawa
description: A famous hill in Terengganu known for its beautiful sunrise and "carpet of clouds."

name: Bukit Besi
description: A trail through a former iron mining hub, featuring historical structures and a beautiful lake.

name: HikeWise Master Trail
description: The ultimate combined experience designed for the HikeWise community, featuring both inland jungle and coastal ridge segments.
